faqs.question: Explain a key concept related to this topic.
faqs.answer: Candidates should clearly explain the concept, provide real-world examples, and discuss best practices.

faqs.question: Why is this concept important in software engineering?
faqs.answer: Understanding this concept helps developers design efficient and reliable systems.

faqs.question: What tools are commonly used in this area?
faqs.answer: Developers typically use industry-standard tools and frameworks depending on the technology stack.
